calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Guardian Ad Litem'S Petition For Fees/Costs And Discharge
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kenneth Wachtel, via Zoom, for Michela I. Genato Christensen, Martin Genato, Marco Genato and Ariana Genato, Petitioners; Sanford Margolin, via Zoom, Guardian ad Litem (GAL) for Arianna Genato, Minor Beneficiary and Louis Genato, Incapacitated Beneficiary.

Mr. Margolin confirms that he has no reason to oppose this petition. The court confirms with Mr. Margolin that he intends to apply for a fair amount of fees for his services that as GAL. The court states that he would typically be required to file a fully-noticed petition to request said fees but the court is willing to offer him the option of filing an ex parte application for fees in lieu of the fully-noticed petition. The court confirms with Mr. Wachtel that he does not oppose the court's proposal to Mr. Margolin so long as he is provided with notice regarding the ex parte application for fees.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Jul-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Continued To Jun-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kenneth Wachtel, via Zoom, for Michela Christensen, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges the challenging position of this matter and of the consent of the current corporate trustee's consent to the proposed trust modification. The court advises counsel that it will be requiring the appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem before proceeding with this matter and advises counsel regarding the court's procedure to petition for the appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Modify Trust is continued to Jun-20-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
